Your organization can also pose a risk to your customers.

ABN AMRO Editorial. The digital transformation is rapidly changing the food and manufacturing industry, increasing cyber risks. Suppliers and subcontractors are not only important partners, but also a risk factor. Your organization can also pose a risk to your customers. Experts discuss the increase in cyber risks during a webinar.

The digital transformation is rapidly changing the food and manufacturing industry, increasing cyber risks. Suppliers and subcontractors are not only important partners, but also a risk factor. Your organization can also pose a risk to your customers. Experts discuss the increase in cyber risks during a webinar. Under the leadership of David Kemps (Sector Banker at ABN AMRO), Richard Verbrugge, cybersecurity expert at ABN AMRO, Daan Hoogendijk (program director of Samen Digitaal Veilig) and Wim Kannegieter (Director of the Dutch Bakery Association) discuss the cyber threats and opportunities within the food and (manufacturing) industry.

Suppliers and subcontractors are not only important partners, but also a risk factor. Your organization can also pose a risk to your customers. Experts discuss the increase in cyber risks during a webinar. Under the leadership of David Kemps (Sector Banker at ABN AMRO), Richard Verbrugge, cybersecurity expert at ABN AMRO, Daan Hoogendijk (program director of Samen Digitaal Veilig) and Wim Kannegieter (Director of the Dutch Bakery Association) discuss the cyber threats and opportunities within the food and (manufacturing) industry. In addition, Bart van Es, IT Manager at Trymax Semiconductor B.V. speaking.

Your organization can also pose a risk to your customers. Experts discuss the increase in cyber risks during a webinar. Under the leadership of David Kemps (Sector Banker at ABN AMRO), Richard Verbrugge, cybersecurity expert at ABN AMRO, Daan Hoogendijk (program director of Samen Digitaal Veilig) and Wim Kannegieter (Director of the Dutch Bakery Association) discuss the cyber threats and opportunities within the food and (manufacturing) industry. In addition, Bart van Es, IT Manager at Trymax Semiconductor B.V. speaking. Trymax Semiconductor B.V. has been working on the security of the organization for some time.

Experts discuss the increase in cyber risks during a webinar. Under the leadership of David Kemps (Sector Banker at ABN AMRO), Richard Verbrugge, cybersecurity expert at ABN AMRO, Daan Hoogendijk (program director of Samen Digitaal Veilig) and Wim Kannegieter (Director of the Dutch Bakery Association) discuss the cyber threats and opportunities within the food and (manufacturing) industry. In addition, Bart van Es, IT Manager at Trymax Semiconductor B.V. speaking. Trymax Semiconductor B.V. has been working on the security of the organization for some time. Topics during the webinar
The role of supply chain security in the food and (manufacturing) industry and how you can protect the chain against cyber threats, with a focus on compliance with NIS2 requirements.

Under the leadership of David Kemps (Sector Banker at ABN AMRO), Richard Verbrugge, cybersecurity expert at ABN AMRO, Daan Hoogendijk (program director of Samen Digitaal Veilig) and Wim Kannegieter (Director of the Dutch Bakery Association) discuss the cyber threats and opportunities within the food and (manufacturing) industry. In addition, Bart van Es, IT Manager at Trymax Semiconductor B.V. speaking. Trymax Semiconductor B.V. has been working on the security of the organization for some time. Topics during the webinar
The role of supply chain security in the food and (manufacturing) industry and how you can protect the chain against cyber threats, with a focus on compliance with NIS2 requirements. Practical steps and strategies to strengthen your digital security in line with the new guideline.

Take cyber measures yourself or report fraud? About 1 in 5 entrepreneurs is confronted with cybercrime. Such a cyber incident can have major consequences for business operations, customers, suppliers or reputation. Taking appropriate measures is therefore important for every company.
